mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_record (amount, category_id, record_date, remark) VALUES (#{amount}, #{categoryId}, #{recordDate}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, c.name AS categoryName, c.type AS categoryType FROM t_record r LEFT JOIN t_category c ON r.category_id = c.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(r.record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY r.record_date DESC, r.create_time DESC

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN c.type=1 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN c.type=2 THEN r.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense FROM t_record r LEFT JOIN t_category c ON r.category_id = c.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(r.record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}

SELECT c.name AS categoryName, SUM(r.amount) AS totalAmount, c.type AS categoryType FROM t_record r LEFT JOIN t_category c ON r.category_id = c.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(r.record_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month} GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.type ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
